text:
administered seven tests to Aadith and on the basis of the same 
noted that: (i) He is capable of carrying out basic daily activities, such 
as brushing his teeth and selecting clothing; (ii) He struggles with 
independent self-care when left alone and has difficulty performing 
more complex tasks such as, handling a knife to cut fruits and seeking 
medical attention; (iii) He struggles with basic addition and subtraction; 
(iv) He has difficulty performing simple mental calculations; (v) He 
lacks the ability to navigate social situations safely and identify harmful 
relationships or situations; (vi) He would have difficulty engaging 
in small remunerative work such as, making simple garments and 
making minor repairs; (vii) He faces challenges performing routine, 
responsible chores for his age such as, cleaning a car and washing 
windows; and (viii) He would have difficulty maintaining a job for 
at least one year, even if required to work only 10 hours per week.
